societies.name: IEEE Computer Society
societies.description: Leading organization for computer science and engineering professionals worldwide.

societies.name: IEEE Power & Energy Society
societies.description: Advancing electric power engineering for a sustainable future.

societies.name: IEEE Power Electronics Society
societies.description: Advancing power electronics technology and applications across industries.

societies.name: IEEE Robotics & Automation Society
societies.description: Advancing innovation, education and research in robotics and automation.

societies.name: IEEE Aerospace & Electronic Systems Society
societies.description: Covering systems, theories and applications in aerospace and electronics.

societies.name: IEEE Antennas & Propagation Society
societies.description: Developing antennas and propagation technologies for communication systems.

societies.name: IEEE Computational Intelligence Society
societies.description: Advancing computational intelligence for science and technology applications.

societies.name: IEEE Geoscience & Remote Sensing Society
societies.description: Advancing geoscience and remote sensing research and technology globally.

societies.name: IEEE Microwave Theory & Techniques Society
societies.description: Advancing microwave theory and its applications across industries.

societies.name: IEEE SIGHT
societies.description: Special Interest Group on Humanitarian Technology — technology for good.

societies.name: IEEE Women in Engineering
societies.description: Empowering women in engineering and inspiring girls worldwide to pursue STEM.

events.title: Annual Tech Summit 2026
events.description: A flagship conference on emerging technologies including AI, quantum computing, and 6G networks.

events.title: Workshop on AI Ethics
events.description: An in-depth exploration of ethical implications of artificial intelligence in society and industry.

events.title: IEEE Hackathon: Build for Impact
events.description: 48-hour hackathon focused on building humanitarian tech solutions. Open to all IEEE members.

events.title: Robotics Competition Showcase
events.description: Annual Robocon training and qualification event. All RAS members compete in a live field challenge.

events.title: WIE Leadership Summit
events.description: Annual leadership development summit for women in engineering. Panels, mentorship sessions, and networking.

announcements.title: Elections Coming Soon
announcements.content: Annual officer elections will be held in August. Nominate yourself!

announcements.title: New Mentorship Program
announcements.content: Join our peer mentorship program to connect with senior members.

communityMessages.content: Welcome to the IEEE Community Hub!
